programs.title: Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: Danny Sebastian learns about the glittering career of comedian and actor Arthur Askey as 200 of his personal items go under the hammer.

programs.title: BBC News at One including BBC London News
programs.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programs.title: Scam Interceptors
programs.desc: The team are forced to dispatch their ground interceptors to save a woman in Essex from a devious scammer posing as PayPal.

programs.title: Attenborough and the Mammoth Graveyard
programs.desc: Sir David Attenborough joins archaeologists excavating mammoth remains near Swindon to discover whether Neanderthals might have killed the Ice Age beasts.

programs.title: Escape to the Country
programs.desc: Today's escapees want to raise their children near the sea, so Jules Hudson takes them to view a selection of wonderful homes in the Devon and Dorset countryside.

programs.title: Celebrity Bridge of Lies
programs.desc: Ross Kemp hosts as Pussycat Doll Kimberly Wyatt, Claire Richards from Steps, Eternal's Kéllé Bryan and Sugababe Amelle Berrabah take on the Bridge of Lies.
